titleStmt.title: SII 16.169: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 169. (A.R. No. 63 of 1915.) CHINNA-AHŌBALAM, SIRVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Narasiṁhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Kīlaka, Āshāḍha śu 11. If the Śaka year is a mistake for 1470, the details correspond to 1548 A.D., June 16, (Saturday).

States that Narasamma, wife of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōbūri Vōbaya of Kāśyapagōtra and Yajuś-śākha, having constructed a vasanta-maṇḍapa to the north of Diguva-Tirupati, endowed 120 varāhas to the temple for conducting, out of the interest thereon the festivals in honour of the god Ahōbalēśvara in that maṇḍapa. Narasiṅgarāju, Narasarāju, Timmarāju, and another, name not mentioned, the four sons of the donar, were to supervise the proper conduct of the festivals enjoined in the gift deed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . dēvasrēṇi sirōratnaṁ daityadvipaghaṭāṁkuśaṁ . jayatu śrī nārasiṁhvasya dēvadēvasya śāsanaṁ . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1469 Agu nēṁṭi kīlakanāma
saṁvatsara Āṣāḍa śudha 11 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsiva dēvamahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu pṛthvīsāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍaṁ
(ṁ) gānuṁ svastiśrīcaturbhuvanādhīsvara śrīAhōbala vīranārasiṁhvadēvara divya śrīpādaṁbulaku kāsyapagōtraṁ yajussākhādhyāyulaina śrīmaNmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
gōbūri vōbayadēvamahārājuluṁgāri dēvuḷu narasaṁmaṁgāru śrīAhōbalēśvarula diguva tirupatini vuttarabhāgānanu kaṭṭiṁcina vasaṁtamaṁḍḍapā
naku śrī Ahōbalēśvarulu mahōtsavadivasālanu nityōtsavapakṣōtsavamāsōtsavasaṁvatsa rōtsavālanu maṁṭapāna vēṁcēśi tiruvōlagaṁ Avadhariṁci Āragiṁcē dō
śalavaḍi talige 15 ki dō 64 ki minupabēḷlu ma 1 ci 0 . jīlakaṟa vī . = neyi maṁ = Aḍake Amudku pōṁkalu 12 Ākulu 126 Āragiṁpu cēyiṁcē Aṁduku
śrī bhaṁḍārānaku celiṁccina ghaṭi va ga 120 Akṣarālaṁ nūṭayiruvai varahālā yiṁdula vaḍḍikiṁgānu śrī Ahōbalēśvarulu Ācaṁdrārkaṁ Āragiṁppa śēyiṁ
cci yīkaiṁkaryaṁ naḍapaṁgalavāraṁ gobūri narasaṁma komā narasiṁgarāju narasarāju tiṁmarāju vīru ja 4 sulu sadāsēvaparulu .
Digital edition of SII 16.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
